channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 4 com severidade Alta
• 1 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-20896 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Gitea Docker image versions up to and including 1.26.2 use REVERSE_PROXY_TRUSTED_PROXIES=* by default, allowing any source IP to impersonate a user when reverse-proxy authentication headers such as X-WEBAUTH-USER are enabled.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-20896
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

📰 U.S. Government Entity Paid Kairos $1 Million in Data-Theft Extortion Case
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
government entity paid about $1 million to keep stolen files from being leaked, according to a new case study by Rakesh Krishnan for Ransom-ISAC, built on a leaked negotiation chat and the blockchain trail the payment left. The odd part: the group that took the money calls itself Kairos, but it may not be a ransomware gang at all. Krishnan found no sign that it ever locked a single
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/us-government-entity-paid-kairos-group.html
 
📰 Flipper Zero firmware development continues with community help
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Flipper Devices says development of the Flipper Zero firmware will continue, albeit with a smaller internal team and greater reliance on community contributions.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/flipper-zero-firmware-development-continues-with-community-help/
 
📰 NetNut proxy network disrupted, 2 million infected devices cut off
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A joint operation involving Google has disrupted NetNut, a residential proxy network that gave access to millions of compromised Android devices, including smart TVs and streaming boxes.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/netnut-proxy-network-disrupted-2-million-infected-devices-cut-off/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

📰 Islamic Terrorists End Attack On Ubuntu, Turn To Cloudflare Récidive (vGdCUzPTYF) - Mshale
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Ubuntu, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE8xd3ZJMzZxWTZFcVl6Z0R4YXdUVmQwTExld2psdnhPa283LTJKZVRPZlA2YTJua2htMkNaT3FsOUdCekdVenhyZWd3RDFvMnZIdGN6QTFiNnFqUkRrYlJCWg?oc=5
 
📰 Attack on Titan 3: Winter 2026 Release & MAPPA Cinematic Update | Outlook Respawn - Outlook Respawn
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxQdW9XcVY3Mmh0Z3R1NDdCS1A5N1h6dVlQMUU1RmN1VktSWVd1a1drSWh3d3pEa2dsWWlWb2hxanZudjdfSE92eVRUYi1BUllpZDNnUHNiajJMeWh3Yzl1aE83Zmp0ZmRINnd0QTVHeUgwSDF0aXZpTE0zd0ZoemxsQ2JweFQ1VEtWZ1JtWnZ1cHhMSjVBaE9icUdzbk5FdWVYRVM4ZlNTckhzcWxHeFk0el930gG_AUFVX3lxTE51elh1RzFfVUtwMEQzTGZoQ0Jyc215VVJPZ0pSZXNWd0xqVHZZdGpla2Nja1B3aTJETDJialJaRTFnN3UyYmFmTFBBM0l3NkpEcnp6dXYwNjQtZnhscGNOWGV6Q2s0bi1yUjdGVTk4V1pURGp0N3RMenIwRUJhdWhSTzA1aGlBMmR5dXZOTjNfV3hsMTNOU3hlTW42NFl2ajNKaVktNUU5S0Y0YTJlYWNBczVfOXc5M0VxS3RZUmkw?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft 365 users fall victim to one-in-a-million password spray attack - Computerworld
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxOX1dJQ3J1WjBtN3k5NXpGMUxyZUo5RXcxY0JzZGN6ZjlKWk1CbHd2aEY0YlVWVVhlbklERGFZdG5YNTNsSXRBV1B5blpIei14NENvRjhWc0gzNWEycjNNaXRrUkczX0pEaUhvMmd5ZFRkZk51bC1zY1RGRnlyRjd1UWFHRExSbldRU283WjlmTHNDQzhOemlZTFAwb05kSmptZ0N6ejhueXJEbUFScUsxUTNnZ1NUdjFDaGIyLWlpSWVYeFFf?oc=5
 
📰 USN-8496-2: cifs-utils regression
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Ubuntu no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8496-2
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 03/07/2026 até 05/07/2026.
